message: 🌱 Add connect-rpc: More request information in Interceptor.WrapStreamContext() mission (#653)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "connect-rpc-296-more-request-information-in-interceptor-wrapstreamcontext",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "connect-rpc: More request information in Interceptor.WrapStreamContext()",
+    "description": "More request information in Interceptor.WrapStreamContext(). Requested by 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current connect-rpc deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your connect-rpc version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n connect-rpc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=connect-rpc\nhelm list -n connect-rpc 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working connect-rpc installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review connect-rpc configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant connect-rpc configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n connect-rpc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=connect-rpc\nkubectl get configmap -n connect-rpc -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=connect-rpc\n```\nCurrently there is no way to enrich a stream context with information about the request. The `WrapStreamContext()` method only accepts a parent context and does not give us any information about the request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for More request information in Interceptor.WrapStreamContext()",
+        "description": "Streaming interceptors aren't very useful in their current state. Rather\nthan wrapping user code, they wrap the the networking primitives used by\nthe user's code. This is a subtle distinction, but it makes it\nimpossible to write a panic-recovering interceptor. It also makes common\nserver-side\n```yaml\nWith this commit, we change to:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n connect-rpc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=connect-rpc\nkubectl get events -n connect-rpc --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"More request information in Interceptor.WrapStreamContext()\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Streaming interceptors aren't very useful in their current state. Rather\nthan wrapping user code, they wrap the the networking primitives used by\nthe user's code. This is a subtle distinction, but it makes it\nimpossible to write a panic-recovering interceptor. It also makes common\nserver-side interceptors (e.g., authentication) needlessly difficult to\nwrite.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "With this commit, we change to:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "connect-rpc",

+    },
